text:
Assessment data Minimum Data Set (MDS)- Home Health Outcome and Assessment Information Set (OASIS)

- Medicaid Analytic Extract (MAX)- Summary file, inpatient, long term care services, other services, file, drug record, personal summary

Special considerations
- Years of CMS data vary by file, please see the HRS-Medicare website.
- Data security requirements are different from the standard CMS requirements. Contact HRS for more information.
